window_summary: This window tracks the recent curl/curl release stream from version 8.0.1 through 8.20.0, covering a series of feature releases and patch updates with accompanying changelogs, blog posts, and release videos.

questions.query_text: Across the curl/curl releases, how does the release 8.7.1 differ from the release 8.7.0?

options.text: 8.7.1 includes a release video, while 8.7.0 does not.
8.7.1 has the same changes as 8.7.0 but fixes a broken file in the tarballs.
8.7.1 introduces HTTP/2 over proxy, while 8.7.0 does not.
8.7.1 is a major feature release, while 8.7.0 is a patch release.

questions.expected_answer: 8.7.1 has the same changes as 8.7.0 but fixes a broken file in the tarballs.

questions.query_text: In the curl/curl release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that provides a changelog and a release blog post titled 'curl 8.2.0', (2) a release that provides a changelog and a release blog post titled 'curl 8.1.2 ate one too', (3) a release that provides a changelog and a release blog post titled 'curl 8.3.0'.

answer_support.answer_text: a release blog post titled '8.1.2 ate one too'
